data.name: 調皮吸血鬼與魅惑之森
data.detailed_description:
【☆故事☆】

身為魔物獵人的我，成功捕獲了吸血鬼娜梅爾！

但，在回家路上卻迷失在森林中了……！ 

捕捉娜梅爾的「法術」在穿越森林的過程中逐漸減弱，必須在「法術」還有效的時候走出這座森林！

【☆女主角☆】

【☆遊戲玩法介紹☆】

此遊戲的玩法簡單易上手，只需要使用滑鼠選擇主角的移動方向，然後點擊地圖即可行動。

地圖上充滿了各種效果，玩家可能會遇到魔物，減少對娜梅爾的緊縛度；
也可能拾取有益的食物，增加緊縛度；甚至發現可以用在娜梅爾身上的特殊道具。

試著避開各式各樣的陷阱，在緊縛度降至零之前努力逃出森林吧！

如果在逃亡的過程中嘗試培養與娜梅爾的感情，或許還有機會迎來一個美好的結局……！？

*遊戲內部皆為無碼版本*

data.short_description: 這是一個身為魔物獵人並捕獲到吸血鬼的我，在迷失於森林的路上，一邊「教訓」她一邊找出回家的路的故事。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 620
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: The Naughty Vampire and the Moaning Forest
data.detailed_description:
☆Summary☆

You play as a monster hunter who has bagged himself a vampire called Namel.

But on his way home through the forest, he gets lost!

And the spell he used to capture Namel will only weaken the longer he stays lost.

It's up to you to find a way out before the spell wears off!

☆Heroine☆

☆Quick Tutorial☆

Playing this game is a piece of cake. Just move your mouse cursor over to the available square you want to move the hunter to, and click on it to move him there.

Different squares will trigger events with different effects, such as succubus encounters that will decrease Namel’s bondage level, or the hunter eating food that will increase her bondage level.
You can also come across special pervy items to use on Namel!

The key is to avoid succubi as much as you can and get out of the forest before her bondage level reaches zero!

If you make Namel lewd enough by the time you make your escape, you’ll bag yourself a sexier ending!

*All content within the game is uncensored.*

data.short_description: In this sexy board game, you play as a monster hunter who has bagged himself a sexy vampire, but gets lost on his way home through the forest. As you search for a way out, you'll get to put the "cock" into your cocky vampire bitch.

Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
